'''2-6-230

Nun Buoy (U.S.A.)

A buoy of which the upper part of the body (above the waterline), or the larger part of the superstructure, has approximately the shape of a cone with vertex upwards.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig62.jpg|400px|border]]


Note: In France, a conical buoy of which the lower part of the body (mainly below the waterline) is of spherical shape is also known as a Bouee Sphero-Conique.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Conical Buoy (G.B.)}}
